name: hugegraph-ai-deepwiki-skill
description: Repository knowledge assistant for Apache HugeGraph AI.

interface.shortDescription: Ask repository-grounded questions about Apache HugeGraph AI.
interface.longDescription: Provides an Apache HugeGraph AI repository knowledge assistant for installation, examples, agents, RAG workflows, graph-enhanced AI, model integration, configuration, and implementation questions. DeepWiki MCP is used as the underlying retrieval channel.
defaultPrompt: Use $hugegraph-ai-deepwiki-skill to answer my HugeGraph AI repository question.
